World.title: 'Bit of pain' worth long-term security from Iran, Bessent tells BBC
World.desc: US Treasury Secretary said a "small bit of economic pain" was worth it to eliminate the threat of Iranian strikes on Western capitals.

World.title: Israel and Lebanon hold first direct talks since 1993
World.desc: A US statement said the two sides had agreed to launch direct negotiations, at a time and place to be determined.

World.title: Three years of messages at once - a chronicle of Sudan's war pours in as trapped reporter's phone turns on
World.desc: As the conflict enters its fourth year, journalist Mohamed Suleiman shudders at what has been lost.

World.title: Magyar meets Hungarian president as Trump says next PM 'a good man'
World.desc: The man who ended Viktor Orbán's 16 years of continuous rule, Péter Magyar, is calling for a speedy transfer of power.

World.title: 250 missing after migrant boat sinks in Indian Ocean
World.desc: The trawler "reportedly sank due to heavy winds, rough seas and overcrowding", the United Nations said.

World.title: South Africa names apartheid-era politician as new ambassador to the US
World.desc: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.

Technology.title: Palantir defends its record as MPs demand more scrutiny of data use
Technology.desc: NHS guidance that all hospitals should be using Palantir software from this month has sparked a backlash.

Technology.title: Man charged with attempted murder over attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
Technology.desc: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.

Technology.title: Quantum computing: A tech race Europe could win?
Technology.desc: With some promising computing companies in the field, could Europe be a leader in quantum tech?

Technology.title: Rolls-Royce launches new two-seater electric car
Technology.desc: The company says it will create only 100 of its Project Nightingale in its Goodwood headquarters.

Technology.title: Roblox defends expanded age‑checks after parents raise concerns over errors
Technology.desc: With 144m daily users, the gaming company is extending its tech to introduce two age‑specific accounts.

Technology.title: GTA-maker Rockstar Games hacked again but downplays impact
Technology.desc: The incident marks the second time the games giant has been hacked by young, English-speaking hackers.

Science.title: New footage shows moment Orion capsule hatch is opened at sea
Science.desc: Newly released video shows the moment the hatch of Artemis II's Orion capsule is unlocked to a joyful reunion with the four astronauts.

Science.title: From blast off to splashdown: My days following Nasa's historic mission to the Moon
Science.desc: BBC Science Editor Rebecca Morelle reflects on how it felt to watch history being made.

Science.title: Golden eagles' return to English skies gets government backing
Science.desc: The birds could be reintroduced as early as next year following a £1m injection from the government.

Science.title: Artemis II mission was a triumph. Now comes the hard part
Science.desc: The mission was almost flawless but there are considerable obstacles ahead before a Moon landing.

Science.title: Want to help garden birds? Don't feed them in warmer months, says RSPB
Science.desc: The UK's largest bird charity has issued new guidance advising people to stop using feeders to help wildlife thrive.

Science.title: Has Artemis II shown we can land on the Moon again?
Science.desc: The Artemis II mission has been near flawless to date, but has the test flight shown Nasa is ready to send humans to the lunar surface?
